attacking_style: Does not typically initiate attacks; relies on positioning and limiting losses rather than explosive moves. Struggles to respond when terrain combines technical challenges with sustained gradients.
team_tactics: Limited evidence of dedicated team support for attacks. Appears to ride defensively, focusing on maintaining position rather than orchestrating offensive moves through team tempo.
terrain_preference: Performs best on sustained climbs without technical complications. Gravel sectors and mixed-surface terrain expose significant weaknesses, particularly when combined with gradients.
vulnerability: Gravel-gradient combinations cause severe time losses (49 seconds in single stage). Chase coordination and tactical execution in decisive moments also problematic, failing to capitalize on reduced gaps.
key_patterns: Struggles on gravel surfaces: lost pink jersey and 49s on gravel-climb combo (2 observations)
Strong individual efforts undermined by tactical/coordination failures in finale (2 observations)
Capable of limiting gaps to top GC riders on standard climbs early-career (2 observations)
Recovery/resilience after setbacks: strongest in chase after early crash at Strade (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed physical strength (best of chase group) but persistent tactical execution problems that plagued 2021 Giro remain unresolved
